zh.Samlesbury, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Southworth於1393年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利時，他的父親John Southworth43歲，母親Lady Margaret De Houghton23歲。他於1419年與Joan Booth在英國藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1432年4月27日在他的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Southworth于1393年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利时，他的父亲John Southworth43岁，母亲Lady Margaret De Houghton23岁。他于1419年与Joan Booth在英国藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1432年4月27日在他的家乡享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Southworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Southworth in Winwick (Lancashire), from Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Suthard
meanings: English: variant of   Southworth  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Southwood
meanings: habitational name from one or more of several places in southern England, especially in Devon, named with Middle English bi southe wode ‘(place) to the south of the wood’.

habitational name from one or more minor places called Southwood or Sowood, from Middle English south(e) + wode ‘south wood’. Sowood in Osset (Yorkshire) is the most likely source of the Yorkshire name. There may have been confusion with Southworth .

variants.name: Sudduth
meanings: English: variant of   Southworth  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Southworth was born in 1393, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Southworth, was 43 and his mother, Lady Margaret De Houghton, was 23. He married Joan Booth in 1419, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 27 April 1432, in his hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Southworth est né en 1393, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Southworth, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret De Houghton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Booth en 1419, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 avril 1432, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Southworth 1393 in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Southworth 43 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret De Houghton 23. Er hat 1419 in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England Joan Booth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. April 1432 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Southworth è nato il nel 1393 nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Southworth, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret De Houghton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joan Booth nel 1419, nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 aprile 1432, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Southworthが1393年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーで生まれた時，父John Southworthは43歳，母Lady Margaret De Houghtonは23歳であった。1419年にイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーでJoan Boothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1432年4月27日に故郷で39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Southworth(이)가 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Southworth(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret De Houghton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1419년 영국 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 Joan Booth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1432년 4월 27일 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Southworth nasceu em 1393, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Southworth, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret De Houghton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Booth em 1419, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de abril de 1432, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Southworth родился в 1393 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Southworth было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret De Houghton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Booth в 1419 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 апреля 1432 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Southworth nació en 1393, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Southworth, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret De Houghton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joan Booth en 1419, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de abril de 1432, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
